title: The First Teacher
writer: Chingiz Aitmatov, Boris Dobrodeyev, Andrey Konchalovskiy
actors: Bolot Beyshenaliev, Natalya Arinbasarova, Idris Nogajbayev
plot: Soviet Union, near the Chinese border, 1923. A stranger has just come in this little country village. He is a teacher, sent by the Communist Party to teach the ignorant masses. But the countrymen are to help him, and even to let t...
